resources.string: Something has gone wrong, so wrong. Help us by sending a crash report, we don\'t want to live in fear anymore…
Could not open image: authorization required
Users from this list are hidden in forum topics. Add them from a post menu in a topic.
Copy URL to spoiler on clipboard?
Copy URL to anchor on clipboard?

You don\'t have to specify the topic and post here, a moderator will receive this information automatically. Please use this section for reporting unacceptable messages only! Use QMS to contact the moderator privately.
BBCode and smiles — tags like when quoting
Local preview: some rare BBCode may differ from the site.
Language has been changed, restart the application?
Transform selected string into the listing?
On the right there\'s a panel with openned tabs.\nIt allows you to conveniently navigate between them.
You can access the links manually
Click here to customize search query
Long press to open advanced response form
You can customize the layout by moving items!
Are you sure want to quit your account?
Delete folder “%1$s”? Its bookmarks will be moved to “No folder”.
Comments will open right below the article
Do you want to clear the text already in progress?
Server did not apply the action
Make a swipe from right to left
As soon as the first post is edited
Will be marked read: %1$d topics. If search is active, this applies only to visible results.
ID is not found, try reloading the page
BBCode (like on the site). «+» opens tags and smiles, same as when replying with a quote.
Upstream changes with the input field in topic?
An error has occurred. Will be loaded via an external downloader.
This file may require 4PDA authorization. Cookies will be passed to the external manager, but not every app supports them.
No external download manager found. Open the file in a browser or use the system downloader.
This is your personal Notepad.\nHere you can store message fragments or any other information that is important to you
Replied to you in the topic \"%s\"
Wrote a post in the topic \"%s\"
New posts in a favorite topic
Open the topic to view the reply
Open favorites to view new posts
You\'ve been mentioned in a comment on the portal
Opens the News section on launch.
Opens the Favorites section on launch.
Opens the Forum section on launch.
Opens the Replies section on launch.
Opens the QMS section on launch.
Choose which sections appear first on the bottom bar; the rest remain in the full menu.
The first four items appear on the bottom bar; another icon opens the full menu. Hold a row and drag up or down.
Selected folder is unavailable. Choose the downloads folder again.
Dark background without the fully black AMOLED surface.
Deep black surfaces for AMOLED screens; accents stay visible.
Follows the system light or dark theme.
Follows the system theme and uses AMOLED surfaces in dark mode.
Choose the color of buttons, links and selection
Unavailable for reading palettes — works only with the System style
Overridden by system colors (Material You) — turn them off to pick your own accent
Pick the icon shown on your home screen
The icon will change once you leave the app
Orange P4DA mark on a light surface.
White four on a graphite plate.
Blue four on a white plate.
Colour puzzle pieces; white background, black in dark theme.
Orange four with a message bubble.
Iridescent glass four; blue in light theme, black in dark.
A more saturated accent instead of muted
Base colors from the selected theme. AMOLED keeps the deepest background.
Warm palette for long reading: softer surfaces and accents without changing navigation.
Warm sepia surfaces with muted Telegram-like blue accents for light, dark, and AMOLED themes.
Less visual noise: calmer accents and dividers, background comes from the current theme.
Sepia is available with light, dark, and system themes
Not supported on your version of Android.
Light vibration on tab switches, sending, and other actions. Respects the system vibration setting.
Enable if system has gesture at bottom of screen
For weak devices or a problematic Android System WebView: improves stability by reducing aggressive rendering
Being applied for topics, search and chat
Default: device system font; fully applies after restart
Roboto as a separate font choice; fully applies after restart
Source Sans 3; fully applies after restart
Open Sans; fully applies after restart
Font change fully applies after app restart
Hide the post typing field by default
Shows a floating button: tap to scroll the topic, hold to open page navigation.
Preloads the next topic page while scrolling down so jumping to it is instant. Disabled in WebView compatibility mode.
Where to show the page buttons. The bottom panel is unavailable in hybrid mode.
Hybrid: adjacent pages load while scrolling, so reading feels like a feed.
Classic: one topic page is open; move with the panel, menu, or page gestures.
Compact: less spacing between posts and inside blocks
Super compact: maximum density for opened topics
The topic toolbar is always visible.
The toolbar hides when scrolling down and appears when scrolling up.
Classic mode: swipe left for next page, right for previous. You can turn it off here.
Available only in Classic topic reading mode.
In topics: pull upward from the bottom edge to refresh the current page. You can turn this gesture off here.
Back closes topics one by one: a linked topic returns to the previous topic.
Back from a linked-topic chain returns directly to the section where the first topic was opened.
Load all pages of favorites. Consumes more traffic.
Show red indicators and numbers for unread favorite topics.
If the app is useful to you, you can support the author in a convenient way. Tap the link to open the payment page, or tap the details below to copy them.
Progress and completion of file downloads. Independent of the main notifications switch.
Off: the app does nothing while closed. Notifications arrive only while it is open.
Sound, vibration, lights and pop-up display are configured in Android channels
App notifications are disabled in Android
Allow notifications in Android settings, otherwise QMS, replies and favorites will not appear in the shade.
Sound, vibration, importance and pop-up display
Change the query, search section, or filters and try again.
Start searching by keywords or user nickname.
Pull to refresh or try loading again later.
Check your connection and try loading again.
There will be mentions in topics and comments
This will display the history of the topic view
Add a topic to favorites from the topic menu to return quickly and see new posts.
Check your connection and try loading again.
Users from this list can not write to you
Check your connection and try loading again.
Check your connection and try the request again.
Check your connection and try loading the page again.
You can change the order of the menu items, to do this, hold down the menu item and drag it to the right place
Storage permission is required to download files
Permission not required on your Android version
How many main sections to show on the bottom bar: 5 or 6. Existing order is preserved.
Smart button below: tap to scroll up/down, hold to navigate topic pages.
Could not jump to the end of the topic
Pull to refresh or go back and choose another forum section.
Check your connection and try loading again.
